name: E-10 rule deprecation lifecycle: /doctor --check deprecations reports deprecated rules with their replaced_by chain
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - id: old-rule
    deprecated: true
    replaced_by: ["new-rule"]
' > tree/google/g.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --check deprecations --tree "$PWD/tree" 2>err.txt; grep -q 'deprecations: old-rule deprecated, replaced_by \[new-rule\]' err.txt && echo reported 1>&2
